node.title: Uber | Phone screen | Map with getRandom API

topic.title: Uber | Phone screen | Map with getRandom API

post.content: That comic is on point, sure to pass anyone through to onsite.
Can anyone please explain why we need both a Map and List ? is it not possible to implement everything just using Map?
I am not sure if the *swap* in above remove method buys us anything. The standard ArrayList *remove* method seems to be pretty optimized - https://stackoverflow.com/a/24462605.
